fetch.description: Fetch web content — ASF scraping, COMPRANET lookups, external data

filesystem.description: Read/write access to the full project directory

sqlite.description: Direct SQL queries against 3.1M-row procurement DB — no Python script needed

sequential-thinking.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning for complex multi-file tasks and model design

puppeteer.description: Browser automation — UI testing at port 3009, scraping COMPRANET pages

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph across sessions — vendor investigation threads, risk notes

apidog.description: Live OpenAPI spec reader — validates endpoints, generates correct client calls
